execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0 - 1
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        if string.is_empty(out)
          out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
        end
        start = 0 - 1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
when None
  println("")
end
